title: CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides consultation, assessment, and investigations to determine if a person meets the legal criteria for a judge to rule whether or not they should receive treatment against their will. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing a mental illness, in immediate danger of harming themselves or others, unable to care for basic needs, or refusing treatment Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 846-4528 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-4528 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Involuntary Psychiatric Intervention Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER
